privileged_info_summary: The task involves importing 4 synthetic risks from a CSV file (/home/ga/Desktop/legacy_clinic_risks.csv) into Eramba GRC (Governance, Risk & Compliance) platform. The CSV contains exactly 4 risks with the following titles: 'Unpatched Legacy MRI Systems', 'Clinic WiFi Guest Access', 'Paper Records Storage', and 'Third-Party Lab Interface'. All risk titles and associated keywords (Windows XP, Ransomware, End-of-life, VLAN, Guest, segmentation, cabinet, Physical, access controls, API, Interception, authentication) are present in the CSV data created during task setup. The CSV field mapping is: Risk Name→Title, Risk Detail→Description, Threat Agent→Threats, Weakness→Vulnerabilities. The task is performed on a self-hosted Eramba Community Edition instance running in Docker (containers: eramba-db, eramba-app) at localhost:8080. Target location is the Business Risks section under Asset Risk Management.
